name: Toll House Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the flour, baking soda and salt; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter, sugars, and vanilla until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, stirring until well combined.
5. Stir in the chocolate morsels.
6. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake for 8-10 minutes at 375°F.
- Turn off and allow cooling on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
